rationale: In the citing paper, Marinova et al. (2018) appears as part of a grouped introductory citation to note that some prior work questions the independence of sales events. The paper does not discuss that study's mechanisms, measures, or results in a distinct way, and it does not use it to build hypotheses or the empirical strategy. The substantive development is instead anchored in momentum and clumpiness literature, so this citation functions as broad background positioning.
